creator: dufresnep@zoho.com
text:
had tried: portmaster devel/py-babel (14.0-Current)
> ===>  Installing for py38-Babel-2.9.1
> ===>  Checking if py38-Babel is already installed
> ===>   Registering installation for py38-Babel-2.9.1 as automatic
> Installing py38-Babel-2.9.1...
> pkg-static: py38-Babel-2.9.1 conflicts with py37-Babel-2.8.0 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/pybabel
> *** Error code 1

I am not very experimented. Unsure it is not something I do wrong.
